description: Summon a level 14...20 Naga Shaman (40...60 lifespan) that has Stoning. Only 1 Asura Summon can be active a time.

name: Deft Strike
description: Deals 18...30 damage. Inflicts Bleeding condition (18...30 seconds) if target foe has Cracked Armor.

name: Signet of Infection
description: Inflicts Diseased condition 13...20 seconds if target foe is Bleeding.

name: Tryptophan Signet
description: (14...20 seconds.) Target and adjacent foes move and attack 23...40% slower.

name: Ebon Battle Standard of Courage
description: (14...20 seconds.) Allies in this ward have +24 armor and +24 more armor against Charr. Spirits are unaffected.

name: Ebon Battle Standard of Wisdom
description: (14...20 seconds.) Spells that allies in this ward cast have a 44...60% chance to recharge 50% faster. Spirits are unaffected.

name: Ebon Battle Standard of Honor
description: (14...20 seconds.) Allies in this ward deal +8...15 damage and +7...10 more damage against Charr. Spirits are unaffected.

name: Ebon Vanguard Sniper Support
description: Deals 54...90 piercing damage and inflicts Bleeding condition (5...25 seconds). 10% chance of +540...900 piercing damage. 25% chance of +540...900 piercing damage if target foe is a Charr.

name: Ebon Vanguard Assassin Support
description: Summon a level 14...20 assassin that has Iron Palm, Fox Fangs, and Nine Tail Strike; it Shadow Steps to this foe. If this foe is a Charr, the assassin lives for 24...30 seconds. If target foe is not a Charr, the Assassin lives for 12...15 seconds.

name: Well of Ruin
description: (5...30 seconds.) Inflicts Cracked Armor condition (5...20 seconds) to any foe in the well that takes physical damage. Exploits a fresh corpse.

name: Atrophy
description: (3...7 seconds.) Reduces this foe's primary attribute to 0.

name: Spear of Redemption
description: Deals +5...20 damage. If it fails to hit, you lose one condition.

name: "Finish Him!"
description: Deals 44...80 damage and inflicts Cracked Armor and Deep Wound conditions (12...20 seconds). No effect unless target foe has less than 50% Health.

name: "Dodge This!"
description: (16...20 seconds.) Your next attack is unblockable and deals +14...20 damage.

name: "I Am the Strongest!"
description: Your next 5...8 attacks deal +14...20 damage.

name: "I Am Unstoppable!"
description: (16...20 seconds.) You have +24 armor and cannot be knocked-down or Crippled.

name: A Touch of Guile
description: Touch Hex Spell. Deals 44...80 damage. Target foe cannot attack (5...8 seconds) if it was knocked-down.

name: "You Move Like a Dwarf!"
description: Deals 44...80 damage, causes knock-down, and inflicts Crippled condition (8...15 seconds).

name: "You Are All Weaklings!"
description: Inflicts Weakness condition (8...12 seconds). Also affects adjacent foes.

name: Feel No Pain
description: (30 seconds.) You have +2...3 Health regeneration. You have +200...300 maximum Health if you are drunk when activating this skill.

name: Club of a Thousand Bears
description: Deals +6...9 damage for each adjacent foe (maximum 60 damage). Causes knock-down if target foe is non-human.

name: Ursan Blessing
description: You lose all effects and take on the aspect of the bear (60 seconds). All your attributes are set to 0 and bear attacks replace your skills, and you have 100 armor and 750...800 Health.

name: Volfen Blessing
description: You lose all effects and take on the aspect of the wolf (60 seconds). All your attributes are set to 0 and wolf attacks replace your skills, and you have 80 armor, 660...700 Health and 2...4 Health regeneration.

name: Raven Blessing
description: You lose all effects and take on the aspect of the Raven (60 seconds). All your attributes are set to 0 and raven attacks replace your skills, and you have 80 armor, 660...700 Health, and a 20...30% block chance.

name: Mindbender
description: (10...16 seconds.) You move 20...33% faster and cast Spells 20% faster.

name: Smooth Criminal
description: (10...20 seconds.) Disables one Spell. This skill becomes that Spell. You gain 5...10 Energy.

name: Technobabble
description: Deals 30...40 damage to target and adjacent foes. Inflicts daze condition (3...5 seconds) on these foes if target was not a boss.

name: Radiation Field
description: (5 seconds.) Causes -4...6 Health degeneration to foes in the area. End effect: inflicts Disease condition (12...20 seconds) to foes in the area.

name: Asuran Scan
description: (9...12 seconds.) You cannot miss target foe. If you kill this foe, you lose 5% Death Penalty.

name: Air of Superiority
description: (20...30 seconds). Gain a random Asura benefit every time you earn experience from killing an enemy.

name: Mental Block
description: (5...11 seconds.) You have a 50% chance to block. Renewal: every time an enemy hits you.

name: Pain Inverter
description: (6...10 seconds.) Deals 100...140% of the attack damage (maximum 80) back to target foe every time it does damage.

name: Ebon Escape
description: Heals you and target ally for 70...110. Initial effect: Shadow Step to this ally. Cannot self-target.

name: Weakness Trap
description: (90 seconds.) Affects nearby foes. Deals 24...50 lightning damage. Inflicts Weakness condition (10...20 seconds). Knocks-down Charr. Easily interrupted.

name: Winds
description: Creates a level 4...10 spirit (54...90 second lifespan.) Affects foes within range. 15% chance to miss with ranged attacks.

name: Dwarven Stability
description: (24...30 seconds.) Your stances last 55...100% longer. You cannot be knocked-down if you activated this skill while drunk . <sub>sic</sub>
